name: Braised Celery
recipeIngredient: 2 large heads of celery (tough outer stalks removed, cut into 6 pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F. Heat butter and olive oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium heat. Add the celery pieces and sauté, turning once, until golden on both sides, about 10 minutes.
2. Sprinkle the celery with salt, add about half a cup of water, and transfer the skillet to the preheated oven. Braise for 10 minutes.
3. Turn the skillet and continue braising the celery until tender but not falling apart, another 10-15 minutes. Return the skillet to the stove and simmer over medium heat until any remaining liquid thickens to form a nice glaze.
Note: When preparing the celery, make sure not to trim off the root end; you'll need it to hold the stalks together.
